metadata.description: Analog / mixed-signal + RF chip design pipeline — 16 plugins across 14 domains plus infrastructure and a meta pipeline orchestrator. Phase 0 skeleton; domains implemented in phases per docs/PLAN.md.

plugins.name: analog-design-architecture
plugins.description: Signal-chain budgeting, per-block spec allocation, and feasibility for analog/mixed-signal

plugins.name: analog-design-modeling
plugins.description: Verilog-A/AMS, VHDL-AMS and SystemVerilog real-number modeling, OSDI compilation, connect modules

plugins.name: analog-design-circuit
plugins.description: Topology selection, device sizing/biasing, schematic capture, pre-layout ERC and design review

plugins.name: analog-design-simulation
plugins.description: SPICE analyses (DC/AC/transient/noise), PVT corners and Monte-Carlo spec sign-off

plugins.name: analog-design-ams-verification
plugins.description: Mixed-signal co-simulation, connect rules, RNM regression, and coverage closure

plugins.name: analog-design-layout
plugins.description: Analog custom layout — floorplan, matched device generation, symmetry/shielded place and route

plugins.name: analog-design-physical-verification
plugins.description: DRC, LVS, antenna/ERC and density/DFM sign-off against foundry decks

plugins.name: analog-design-extraction
plugins.description: RC and coupling parasitic extraction and back-annotated post-layout netlist generation

plugins.name: analog-design-post-layout
plugins.description: Post-PEX corner and Monte-Carlo simulation, spec re-verification, and tape-out gating

plugins.name: analog-design-reliability
plugins.description: Electromigration, IR-drop, ESD, latch-up and aging (HCI/NBTI) analysis and sign-off

plugins.name: analog-design-characterization
plugins.description: Timing/power/noise characterization and Liberty (.lib) / behavioral model generation

plugins.name: analog-design-rf
plugins.description: RF/mmWave design — S-parameter, harmonic balance, Pnoise/PAC, IP3 and load-pull

plugins.name: analog-design-em
plugins.description: Electromagnetic solving for passives/antennas, S-parameter extraction and lumped-model fitting

plugins.name: analog-design-ams-integration
plugins.description: Mixed-signal top assembly, boundary/connect rules, chip-level AMS sim and power intent

plugins.name: analog-design-infrastructure
plugins.description: Analog/RF tool detection, JSON output wrappers, MCP config, and memory distillation

plugins.name: analog-design-meta
plugins.description: Cross-domain pipeline orchestrator — design_state.json fix_request loop with iteration cap and checkpoints
